creator: devnull@apt322.org
text:
There is security issue involved.
After patch, if you could add entry in security/vuxml that would be great

CVE-2022-21658
https://www.cvedetails.com/cve/CVE-2022-21658/

Resume: An attacker could use this security issue to trick a privileged program into deleting files and directories the attacker couldn't otherwise access or delete.
